(a) The fee for an original general distinguishing number is $500 for the first year and $200 for each subsequent year for which the number is valid.

(b) The fee for the renewal of a general distinguishing number is $200 a year.

(c) The registration fee for a drive-a-way in-transit license is $50 a year.

(d) A fee collected under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.007 — Fees for General Distinguishing Number

(a) The fee for an original general distinguishing number is $500 for the first year and $200 for each subsequent year for which the number is valid.

(b) The fee for the renewal of a general distinguishing number is $200 a year.

(c) The registration fee for a drive-a-way in-transit license is $50 a year.

(d) A fee collected under this section shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1287 (H.B.2202), Sec. 28, eff. September 1, 2013.*
